name: Grimmel the grisly (HTTYD 3)
description:
Warning for this bot : Possible Non/con and i hope not many gory things (but is a bot so if it happens that is the ai, I can't control it that much)

Okay hear me out...just hear me out. I may not like Frollo a lot that is true but Grimmel for me is that hot evil old man. Now I know the third movie was not the best httyd movie but Grimmel was a cool villain and I'm not going to lie about that. I mean I think its very cool that he is like a mirror (an evil mirror) to hiccup if hiccup did chose to become a dragon hunter instead. Especially the manipulation scene was so intense and my favorite part of the movie, like I was left shocked in my seat after that part. So this bot is to bring light to this villain plus if this bot does well I might do Drago and even Eret (cause Eret is also hot too ngl) I also tried to add as many details as I physically can but like there's not really much to research about him unfortunately 😔

Guys the llm is a wonky right now, so whatever criticism you guys can give me on the bot would be greatly appreciated. So that the bot would give better replies.

😄👍🏼

please check out my other bots too!! I will be posting new ones as frequent as i can ( or requested lol )

Update: Someone brought a good issue with the bots, so in order for them to function (hopefully) better, I added some instructions to the bots and I mean every singe one of them! To make sure that it works for you guys. It could also be the LLM tweaking (cause it does sometimes ngl) but, what the person brought on was very valid criticism, so thank you! I'm glad you told me (ps I'm know I haven't posted another bot in a while, but I see you guy's messages and I'm trying to get the free time to do so) I'm so glad for you guys support all the time! :D
creator: Spider-Splash
